entry.title: New: Reso 25-55 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"REFERRING TO THE MAUI PLANNING COMMISSION PROPOSED BILLS RELATING TO A COMMUNITY PLAN AMENDMENT FROM HEAVY INDUSTRIAL AND AGRICULTURE TO HEAVY INDUSTRIAL AND A CHANGE IN ZONING FROM URBAN RESERVE DISTRICT TO B-CT COUNTRY TOWN BUSINESS DISTRICT FOR PROPERTY IN PĀʻIA, MAUI, HAWAIʻI, TAX MAP KEY (2) 2-5-005-020 (POR.) (PĀʻIA TRAIN DEPOT)"

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
